center.name: Naltar Valley
center.summary: Naltar Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括霍氏旋木雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hodgsoniNaltar Valley (Gilgit-Baltistan, Pakistan) | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Certhia | species = hodgsoni | authority = Brooks, 1871 | range_map = Treecreepermap.png | range_map_caption = Range in pinkCommon treecreeper range in light green | synonyms = Certhia familiaris hodgsoni Brooks, 1871 Certhia familiaris khamensis Bianchi, 1903 Certhia familiaris mandellii Brooks, 1874 }} Hodgson's treecreeper (Certhia hodgsoni) is a small passerine bird from the southern rim of the Himalayas
